_comment2: This is the shape that AEM authors edit. It maps 1:1 to the TypeScript types in rn-app/src/lib/model.ts
description: Editorial article — used across web, app, and email

fields.name: title
fields.label: Title
fields._note: Headline shown in list and detail screens

fields.name: slug
fields.label: URL slug
fields._note: Used as the routing key in the mobile app — must be unique per locale

fields.name: summary
fields.label: Summary
fields._note: One-paragraph teaser — shown in the list view

fields.name: body
fields.label: Body
fields._note: Rich-text body. Authors get a full editor; the API exposes HTML.

fields.name: hero
fields.label: Hero image
fields._note: DAM reference. The API resolves to a CDN URL with renditions.

fields.name: category
fields.label: Category
fields._note: Tagging for filtering on the list screen

fields.name: publishDate
fields.label: Publish date
fields._note: Used for sort order and 'new' badge logic

fields.name: author
fields.label: Author
fields._note: Reference to another CF. The API resolves nested fragments inline.

fields.name: readTimeMin
fields.label: Read time (min)
fields._note: Computed at author time — could also be derived from body length client-side

fields.name: isFeatured
fields.label: Featured?
fields._note: Surfaces this article in the 'featured' rail on the home screen
